questions.stem: Cyanide blocks the final complex of the electron transport chain. What is the most direct metabolic consequence?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Increased protein glycosylation

choices.label: B
choices.text: A sharp drop in ATP production by oxidative phosphorylation

choices.label: C
choices.text: An increase in ATP production

choices.label: D
choices.text: Faster DNA replication

questions.explanation: By blocking electron transfer to oxygen, cyanide halts the proton gradient that powers ATP synthase, so oxidative phosphorylation and ATP output collapse.
questions.sourceLicense: AI-generated proof-of-concept — not real MCAT/AAMC content
questions.notes: AI-generated proof-of-concept item (text-only). Not real MCAT/AAMC content.
